/CAL:PAROLEE'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW ADMISSION, VACATE SENTENCE, & DISMISS PETITION/MO GRTD/3000REIN/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 06-22-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
